reason: Item 17 closes coverage for src/simsopt/field/normal_field.py, which is byte-identical to upstream SIMSOPT SHA 1b0cc3a96063197cdbdd01559e04c25456fbe6ff and imports zero JAX. The closeout adds a single test-only artifact at tests/field/test_normal_field_item17_closeout.py and does not modify normal_field.py, surfacerzfourier.py, coilset.py, or any other source file. The underlying Fourier-pair helpers (SurfaceRZFourier.fourier_transform_scalar / inverse_fourier_transform_scalar) are pure NumPy with O(mpol * ntor * nphi * ntheta) cost, well below the production-scale hot-path threshold; no JIT entrypoint is touched.

production_scale_floor.mpol_ntor_used: stellsym=True at mpol=4 ntor=3; stellsym=False at mpol=3 ntor=2
cited_existing_production_tests: tests/field/test_normal_field.py::CoilNormalFieldTests::test_real_space_field (SurfaceRZFourier nfp=3, stellsym=False, mpol=12, ntor=12; default quadpoints; atol=1e-3 only)
production_scale_floor.coverage_gap_closed: NormalField / CoilNormalField production-scale (nphi >= 16, ntheta >= 8, ncoils >= 4) bit-tight direct_kernel parity in BOTH stellsym=True and stellsym=False branches AND under strict SIMSOPT_JAX_TRANSFER_GUARD=disallow discipline AND with a wrong-sign negative control was not previously asserted; the existing test_real_space_field fixture uses atol=1e-3 on the truncated-mpol reconstruction and the existing CoilNormalFieldTests cache tests do not assert post-invalidation oracle parity.

dense_materialization_budget.rationale: Largest temporary is the production-scale Biot-Savart B array. No new dense materialization is introduced; the Fourier helpers are O(mpol * ntor * nphi * ntheta) NumPy reductions.

no_perf_change_justification: Item 17 introduces NO new hot-path kernel or JIT entrypoint. The closeout adds a single test-only artifact and does not modify normal_field.py (byte-identical to upstream SIMSOPT 1b0cc3a9), surfacerzfourier.py, or any other source file. Existing benchmark coverage for the underlying CPU BiotSavart oracle lives in tests/field/test_biotsavart.py and tests/field/test_biotsavart_jax.py; the existing Fourier-pair contract is exercised by tests/field/test_normal_field.py (28 tests). No micro-benchmark is required per section 4c carve-out.
